1→import sys
     2→import os
     3→
     4→# 确保项目根目录在 sys.path 中
     5→sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
     6→
     7→from PyQt5.QtWidgets import QApplication
     8→from app.main_window import MainWindow
     9→
    10→
    11→def main():
    12→    app = QApplication(sys.argv)
    13→    # 加载宋代美学样式
    14→    qss_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "app", "styles", "song_dynasty.qss")
    15→    if os.path.exists(qss_path):
    16→        with open(qss_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    17→            app.setStyleSheet(f.read())
    18→    window = MainWindow()
    19→    window.show()
    20→    sys.exit(app.exec_())
    21→
    22→
    23→if __name__ == "__main__":
    24→    main()
    25→

1→import os
     2→import sys
     3→from PyQt5.QtWidgets import (QMainWindow, QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout,
     4→                             QPushButton, QLabel, QMessageBox)
     5→from PyQt5.QtCore import Qt, QTimer, QUrl
     6→from app.widgets.import_bar import ImportBar
     7→from app.widgets.field_selector import FieldSelector
     8→from app.widgets.field_list import FieldList
     9→from app.widgets.favorite_dialog import FavoriteDialog, CategoryManagerDialog
    10→from app.core.nlp_engine import LegalFieldExtractor
    11→from app.core.field_filler import FieldFiller
    12→from app.data.db_manager import DBManager
    13→
    14→
    15→class MainWindow(QMainWindow):
    16→    def __init__(self):
    17→        super().__init__()
    18→        self.setWindowTitle("智能填表助手")
    19→        self.setMinimumSize(480, 650)
    20→        self.setWindowFlags(self.windowFlags() | Qt.WindowStaysOnTopHint)
    21→        self.setAcceptDrops(True)
    22→
    23→        self.nlp = LegalFieldExtractor()
    24→        self.filler = FieldFiller()
    25→        self.db = DBManager()
    26→        self.fields = []
    27→        self.showing_favorites = False
    28→
    29→        central = QWidget()
    30→        self.setCentralWidget(central)
    31→        layout = QVBoxLayout(central)
    32→        layout.setSpacing(8)
    33→
    34→        # 导入栏
    35→        self.import_bar = ImportBar()
    36→        self.import_bar.text_extracted.connect(self._on_text_extracted)
    37→        layout.addWidget(self.import_bar)
    38→
    39→        # 字段选择器
    40→        self.selector = FieldSelector()
    41→        self.selector.fill_requested.connect(self._on_fill)
    42→        layout.addWidget(self.selector)
    43→
    44→        # 字段列表
    45→        self.field_list = FieldList()
    46→        self.field_list.field_clicked.connect(self.selector.set_index)
    47→        self.field_list.field_edited.connect(self._on_field_edited)
    48→        self.field_list.field_deleted.connect(self._on_field_deleted)
    49→        self.field_list.field_favorited.connect(self._on_field_favorited)
    50→        layout.addWidget(self.field_list, stretch=1)
    51→
    52→        # 底部按钮栏
    53→        bottom = QHBoxLayout()
    54→        fav_btn = QPushButton("常用字段")
    55→        fav_btn.setObjectName("favBtn")
    56→        fav_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_favorite_btn)
    57→        bottom.addWidget(fav_btn)
    58→
    59→        cat_btn = QPushButton("管理分类")
    60→        cat_btn.setObjectName("smallBtn")
    61→        cat_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_manage_categories)
    62→        bottom.addWidget(cat_btn)
    63→
    64→        clear_btn = QPushButton("清空列表")
    65→        clear_btn.setObjectName("clearBtn")
    66→        clear_btn.clicked.connect(self._on_clear)
    67→        bottom.addWidget(clear_btn)
    68→
    69→        bottom.addStretch()
    70→        copyright_label = QLabel("著作权属于单夫纯律师所有")
    71→        copyright_label.setObjectName("copyright")
    72→        bottom.addWidget(copyright_label)
    73→        layout.addLayout(bottom)
    74→
    75→    def _on_text_extracted(self, text):
    76→        self.showing_favorites = False
    77→        self.fields = self.nlp.extract_fields(text)
    78→        self.selector.set_fields(self.fields)
    79→        self.field_list.set_fields(self.fields)
    80→
    81→    def _on_fill(self, text):
    82→        # 延迟300ms让目标窗口获得焦点
    83→        QTimer.singleShot(300, lambda: self.filler.paste_text(text))
    84→
    85→    def _on_field_edited(self, index, new_text):
    86→        if 0 <= index < len(self.fields):
    87→            self.fields[index] = new_text
    88→            self.selector.set_fields(self.fields)
    89→            self.selector.set_index(index)
    90→
    91→    def _on_field_deleted(self, index):
    92→        if 0 <= index < len(self.fields):
    93→            self.fields.pop(index)
    94→            self.selector.set_fields(self.fields)
    95→            self.field_list.set_fields(self.fields)
    96→
    97→    def _on_field_favorited(self, text):
    98→        dlg = FavoriteDialog(self.db, self)
    99→        dlg.value_input.setText(text)
   100→        dlg.exec_()
   101→
   102→    def _on_favorite_btn(self):
   103→        msg = QMessageBox(self)
   104→        msg.setWindowTitle("常用字段")
   105→        msg.setText("请选择操作：")
   106→        show_btn = msg.addButton("显示全部常用字段", QMessageBox.AcceptRole)
   107→        add_btn = msg.addButton("添加新常用字段", QMessageBox.ActionRole)
   108→        msg.addButton("取消", QMessageBox.RejectRole)
   109→        msg.exec_()
   110→        if msg.clickedButton() == show_btn:
   111→            self._show_all_favorites()
   112→        elif msg.clickedButton() == add_btn:
   113→            dlg = FavoriteDialog(self.db, self)
   114→            dlg.exec_()
   115→
   116→    def _show_all_favorites(self):
   117→        self.showing_favorites = True
   118→        favs = self.db.get_all_favorites()
   119→        self.fields = [f["value"] for f in favs]
   120→        self.selector.set_fields(self.fields)
   121→        self.field_list.set_fields(self.fields, title="常用字段列表")
   122→
   123→    def _on_manage_categories(self):
   124→        CategoryManagerDialog(self.db, self).exec_()
   125→
   126→    def _on_clear(self):
   127→        if self.showing_favorites:
   128→            return
   129→        self.fields = []
   130→        self.selector.set_fields([])
   131→        self.field_list.set_fields([])
   132→
   133→    # 拖拽支持
   134→    def dragEnterEvent(self, event):
   135→        if event.mimeData().hasUrls():
   136→            event.acceptProposedAction()
   137→
   138→    def dropEvent(self, event):
   139→        from app.core.extractor import DocumentExtractor
   140→        extractor = DocumentExtractor()
   141→        for url in event.mimeData().urls():
   142→            path = url.toLocalFile()
   143→            ext = os.path.splitext(path)[1].lower()
   144→            if ext in ('.pdf', '.docx', '.xlsx', '.png', '.jpg', '.jpeg', '.bmp'):
   145→                text = extractor.extract(path)
   146→                if text:
   147→                    self._on_text_extracted(text)
   148→                break
   149→

1→import re
     2→
     3→# 常见法律停用短语
     4→_STOP_PHRASES = {
     5→    "根据", "依照", "本院认为", "经审理查明", "判决如下", "裁定如下",
     6→    "事实和理由", "诉讼请求", "如不服本判决", "上诉于", "审判长", "审判员",
     7→    "书记员", "人民法院", "民事判决书", "民事裁定书", "行政判决书",
     8→}
     9→
    10→# 百家姓前100
    11→_SURNAMES = (
    12→    "赵钱孙李周吴郑王冯陈褚卫蒋沈韩杨朱秦尤许何吕施张孔曹严华金魏陶姜"
    13→    "戚谢邹喻柏水窦章云苏潘葛奚范彭郎鲁韦昌马苗凤花方俞任袁柳酆鲍史唐"
    14→    "费廉岑薛雷贺倪汤滕殷罗毕郝邬安常乐于时傅皮卞齐康伍余元卜顾孟平黄"
    15→    "和穆萧尹姚邵湛汪祁毛禹狄米贝明臧计伏成戴谈宋茅庞熊纪舒屈项祝董梁"
    16→    "杜阮蓝闵席季麻强贾路娄危江童颜郭梅盛林刁钟徐邱骆高夏蔡田樊胡凌霍"
    17→    "虞万支柯昝管卢莫经房裘缪干解应宗丁宣贲邓郁单杭洪包诸左石崔吉钮龚"
    18→)
    19→_SURNAME_SET = set(_SURNAMES) | {"欧阳", "司马", "上官", "诸葛", "司徒", "令狐", "皇甫"}
    20→
    21→# 正则模式
    22→_ID_CARD = re.compile(r'[1-9]\d{5}(?:19|20)\d{2}(?:0[1-9]|1[0-2])(?:0[1-9]|[12]\d|3[01])\d{3}[\dXx]')
    23→_PHONE = re.compile(r'1[3-9]\d{9}')
    24→_LANDLINE = re.compile(r'0\d{2,3}-?\d{7,8}')
    25→_ROLE_NAME = re.compile(
    26→    r'(原告|被告|第三人|上诉人|被上诉人|申请人|被申请人|申请执行人|被执行人'
    27→    r'|委托(?:诉讼)?代理人|法定代表人|负责人)'
    28→    r'[（(]?[^）)]*?[）)]?[：:\s]*'
    29→    r'([^\s，。；：！？、,.:;!?\n]{2,20})'
    30→)
    31→_COMPANY = re.compile(r'[\u4e00-\u9fff]{2,20}(?:有限公司|股份有限公司|集团|公司|事务所|合伙企业)')
    32→_ADDRESS = re.compile(r'(?:住所地|地址|住址|住)[：:\s]*([^\s，。；！？\n]{4,30})')
    33→_POSTAL = re.compile(r'[1-9]\d{5}(?!\d)')
    34→
    35→
    36→class LegalFieldExtractor:
    37→    def extract_fields(self, text):
    38→        if not text:
    39→            return []
    40→        fields = []
    41→        # 结构化提取
    42→        for m in _ID_CARD.finditer(text):
    43→            fields.append(m.group())
    44→        for m in _PHONE.finditer(text):
    45→            fields.append(m.group())
    46→        for m in _LANDLINE.finditer(text):
    47→            fields.append(m.group())
    48→        for m in _ROLE_NAME.finditer(text):
    49→            fields.append(m.group(1))  # 角色
    50→            name = m.group(2).strip()
    51→            if name:
    52→                fields.append(name)
    53→        for m in _COMPANY.finditer(text):
    54→            fields.append(m.group())
    55→        for m in _ADDRESS.finditer(text):
    56→            fields.append(m.group(1).strip())
    57→        # 标点分界提取
    58→        segments = re.split(r'[，。；：！？、,.:;!?\n\r\t]+', text)
    59→        for seg in segments:
    60→            seg = seg.strip()
    61→            if 2 <= len(seg) <= 30 and self._is_likely_field(seg):
    62→                fields.append(seg)
    63→        return self._deduplicate(fields)
    64→
    65→    def _is_likely_field(self, seg):
    66→        if seg in _STOP_PHRASES:
    67→            return False
    68→        if not re.search(r'[\u4e00-\u9fff]', seg):
    69→            return False
    70→        # 包含数字（可能是证件号、金额等）
    71→        if re.search(r'\d{3,}', seg):
    72→            return True
    73→        # 以姓氏开头且长度2-4（可能是人名）
    74→        if seg[0] in _SURNAME_SET and 2 <= len(seg) <= 4:
    75→            return True
    76→        if seg[:2] in _SURNAME_SET and 3 <= len(seg) <= 5:
    77→            return True
    78→        # 包含地址关键词
    79→        if re.search(r'[省市区县镇村路街道号楼室]', seg):
    80→            return True
    81→        # 包含法律角色关键词
    82→        if re.search(r'原告|被告|代理人|律师|法院|法官', seg):
    83→            return True
    84→        return False
    85→
    86→    def _deduplicate(self, fields):
    87→        seen = set()
    88→        result = []
    89→        for f in fields:
    90→            f = f.strip()
    91→            if f and len(f) <= 30 and f not in seen:
    92→                seen.add(f)
    93→                result.append(f)
    94→        return result
    95→

1→import os
     2→
     3→
     4→class DocumentExtractor:
     5→    def extract(self, file_path):
     6→        ext = os.path.splitext(file_path)[1].lower()
     7→        handlers = {
     8→            '.pdf': self.extract_pdf,
     9→            '.docx': self.extract_word,
    10→            '.xlsx': self.extract_excel,
    11→            '.png': self.extract_image, '.jpg': self.extract_image,
    12→            '.jpeg': self.extract_image, '.bmp': self.extract_image,
    13→        }
    14→        handler = handlers.get(ext)
    15→        if handler:
    16→            return handler(file_path)
    17→        return ""
    18→
    19→    def extract_pdf(self, path):
    20→        import pdfplumber
    21→        texts = []
    22→        with pdfplumber.open(path) as pdf:
    23→            for page in pdf.pages:
    24→                t = page.extract_text()
    25→                if t:
    26→                    texts.append(t)
    27→                for table in page.extract_tables():
    28→                    for row in table:
    29→                        texts.append(" ".join(cell or "" for cell in row))
    30→        return "\n".join(texts)
    31→
    32→    def extract_word(self, path):
    33→        import docx
    34→        doc = docx.Document(path)
    35→        texts = [p.text for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]
    36→        for table in doc.tables:
    37→            for row in table.rows:
    38→                texts.append(" ".join(cell.text for cell in row.cells))
    39→        return "\n".join(texts)
    40→
    41→    def extract_excel(self, path):
    42→        import openpyxl
    43→        wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(path, read_only=True, data_only=True)
    44→        texts = []
    45→        for ws in wb.worksheets:
    46→            for row in ws.iter_rows(values_only=True):
    47→                vals = [str(c) for c in row if c is not None]
    48→                if vals:
    49→                    texts.append(" ".join(vals))
    50→        wb.close()
    51→        return "\n".join(texts)
    52→
    53→    def extract_image(self, path):
    54→        from app.core.ocr_client import BaiduOCR
    55→        ocr = BaiduOCR()
    56→        return ocr.recognize(path)
    57→
    58→    def extract_clipboard(self):
    59→        from PyQt5.QtWidgets import QApplication
    60→        clip = QApplication.clipboard()
    61→        return clip.text() or ""
    62→

1→import ctypes
     2→import ctypes.wintypes
     3→import time
     4→
     5→INPUT_KEYBOARD = 1
     6→KEYEVENTF_UNICODE = 0x0004
     7→KEYEVENTF_KEYUP = 0x0002
     8→VK_CONTROL = 0x11
     9→
    10→
    11→class KEYBDINPUT(ctypes.Structure):
    12→    _fields_ = [
    13→        ("wVk", ctypes.wintypes.WORD),
    14→        ("wScan", ctypes.wintypes.WORD),
    15→        ("dwFlags", ctypes.wintypes.DWORD),
    16→        ("time", ctypes.wintypes.DWORD),
    17→        ("dwExtraInfo", ctypes.POINTER(ctypes.c_ulong)),
    18→    ]
    19→
    20→
    21→class INPUT(ctypes.Structure):
    22→    class _INPUT(ctypes.Union):
    23→        _fields_ = [("ki", KEYBDINPUT)]
    24→    _fields_ = [("type", ctypes.wintypes.DWORD), ("_input", _INPUT)]
    25→
    26→
    27→def _send_unicode_char(char):
    28→    for flags in (KEYEVENTF_UNICODE, KEYEVENTF_UNICODE | KEYEVENTF_KEYUP):
    29→        inp = INPUT()
    30→        inp.type = INPUT_KEYBOARD
    31→        inp._input.ki.wScan = ord(char)
    32→        inp._input.ki.dwFlags = flags
    33→        ctypes.windll.user32.SendInput(1, ctypes.byref(inp), ctypes.sizeof(INPUT))
    34→
    35→
    36→def _send_key(vk, up=False):
    37→    inp = INPUT()
    38→    inp.type = INPUT_KEYBOARD
    39→    inp._input.ki.wVk = vk
    40→    inp._input.ki.dwFlags = KEYEVENTF_KEYUP if up else 0
    41→    ctypes.windll.user32.SendInput(1, ctypes.byref(inp), ctypes.sizeof(INPUT))
    42→
    43→
    44→class FieldFiller:
    45→    def type_text(self, text, interval=0.005):
    46→        """通过SendInput逐字输入Unicode文本"""
    47→        for char in text:
    48→            _send_unicode_char(char)
    49→            if interval:
    50→                time.sleep(interval)
    51→
    52→    def paste_text(self, text):
    53→        """通过剪贴板+Ctrl+V粘贴"""
    54→        import win32clipboard
    55→        import win32con
    56→        win32clipboard.OpenClipboard()
    57→        win32clipboard.EmptyClipboard()
    58→        win32clipboard.SetClipboardData(win32con.CF_UNICODETEXT, text)
    59→        win32clipboard.CloseClipboard()
    60→        time.sleep(0.05)
    61→        _send_key(VK_CONTROL)
    62→        _send_key(0x56)  # V
    63→        _send_key(0x56, up=True)
    64→        _send_key(VK_CONTROL, up=True)
    65→
